title: Fresh Fruit Tray with French Cream for a Party
ingredients: Red leaf lettuce, for lining tray
instructions: Arrange prepared fruit attractively on a platter lined with red leaf lettuce.
For the French cream, beat cream cheese until smooth. Beat in powdered sugar. In a separate bowl, whip cream with granulated sugar until soft peaks form.
Fold whipped cream into cream cheese mixture. Add lemon zest and juice. Thin with pineapple juice as needed to reach a smooth, dippable consistency. Serve alongside fruit.
Served at Katie and Patrick’s wedding reception.
